dialogos.texto_en: Today's meal was also delicious, wasn't it?\nIt was so delicious that I might have eaten too much.
All right, we have to run a lot tomorrow morning.\nAre you ready, Futaro-kun?
Why are you dragging me into this?\nBesides, I'm pretty tired today, so I'm not sure\nif I can wake up properly tomorrow morning.
Don't worry, I'll wake you up gently.
Hey, speaking of which,\nwhere's Raiha-chan?\nHasn't she come back to the room yet?
Oh, she came back briefly earlier,\nbut she said she was going to Itsuki and Yotsuba's room.
Man, she's still so energetic.\nI don't feel like being around her anymore.
Are you that tired?
I'm exhausted. We ran in the morning,\nand then went to Ocean Expo Park without resting once.
And after that, we played in the ocean until sunset.
Looking at it again, it's a schedule\nthat would definitely tire you out.
But you're still energetic, Ichika?
I'm full of energy!\nMy body feels warm,\nand I feel like I can do anything right now.
(Warm? This room has a temperature\n that's neither hot nor cold.)
Hmm, isn't it a waste to just go to sleep like this?
On the other hand,\nI feel like just going to sleep right now.
Oh, wait! We should take a bath tonight.\nWe've been playing in the ocean,\nso our hair will get all tangled.
Do you want to take a bath together?\nI'll wash your back for you.
Th-that's, that's not allowed!\nIf anyone finds out, they'll be EXTRAORDINARILY angry!
So, as long as we keep quiet, no one will find out?
That's not the point!
It's okay.\nWe won't make any noise.
I said no!\nTaking a bath together is out of the question!
Mmmh, why not?\nI was gonna help relieve your tiredness.
(It's going to tire me out even more...)
Oh, I know!\nA way to relieve your fatigue!
Big sister Ichika will give you a massage.\nLie down on the bed.
No, that's okay...!
Don't be shy. I'm sure you'll feel better, you know?\nCome on, hurry up and take off your clothes.
You don't need to take off your clothes for a massage!
*sigh*\nHey, Ichika?\nI'm asking you seriously, are you really okay today?
Geez, not this again? I'm just the same as usual.
You're not acting like your usual self.\nYou're...being too clingy.
What's wrong with being clingy?\nDoes it bother you, Futaro-kun?
N-no, it doesn't bother me, but...\nI'm just worried because\nyou've been acting unusual today%p-2;――
OWAAH?!\nWhat are you doing all of a sudden?!
I said...it's nothing...
Hey, are you alright?\nYou look like you're in pain!
I'm okay...\nI just felt a little dizzy for a moment...
(Whoa!!\n Is Ichika's body unusually warm?\n Could it be...!)
What do you mean you're okay?\nYou have a fever, don't you?\nYour temperature is not normal!
Huh...? Couldn't be...
You should lie down for now.\nJust stay still, okay?
I'm sorry...\nMaybe I'm just being weird after all...
You don't have to force yourself to talk.\nWait, I'll get some water\nand other things ready right away!
...Okay.
